requirements.task_name: Collect 5 'Invoice_2024' PDFs into a new 'Invoices 2024' folder and star it
requirements.task_description: Within the Documents area, create a folder named 'Invoices 2024', find PDF files whose names start with 'Invoice_2024', move exactly 5 of them into the new folder, and star that folder so it appears in favorites.

requirements.task_name: Share the 'Project Alpha' folder with two users with different permissions and an expiry date
requirements.task_description: Locate the 'Project Alpha' folder under Projects, share it with user 'alex_viewer' as a viewer and 'jamie_editor' as an editor, restrict access to invited people only, and set the link access to expire on December 31, 2025.

requirements.task_name: Archive the two largest video files over 500 MB and permanently delete the third largest
requirements.task_description: Use storage and file filters to find video files, identify the three largest files of at least 500 MB, move the two largest into a 'Videos/Archive' folder (creating it if needed), and permanently delete the third largest file.

required_variables.set_condition: When called with filters.fileType == 'video', filters.minSizeBytes >= 500 * 1024 * 1024, sortBy == 'size', and sortDirection == 'desc'.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { filtersUsed: { fileType: filters.fileType, minSizeBytes: filters.minSizeBytes || null, maxSizeBytes: filters.maxSizeBytes || null }, sortBy: sortBy || 'size', sortDirection: sortDirection || 'desc', topThreeIds: items.slice(0, 3).map(it => it.id) } serialized via JSON.
required_variables.reason: Captures the correct filter/sort criteria (video files ≥ 500 MB sorted largest-first) and the IDs of the top 3 results at the time they were identified, so evaluators can verify that subsequent move/delete operations targeted the correct three files.

required_variables.set_condition: After resolving destinationFolderId, if the destination folder exists, is not deleted, has itemType === 'folder', and its path is exactly '/Videos/Archive'.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { movedItemIds: movedIds, destinationFolderId: dest.id, destinationPath: dest.path, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } serialized via JSON.
required_variables.reason: Records which item IDs were moved into 'Videos/Archive'. Combined with task3_videoFilterParams.topThreeIds, the evaluator can check that the two largest qualifying videos (the first two IDs) were the ones moved to the Archive folder.

required_variables.set_condition: On every successful call to permanentlyDeleteItems, after computing idsArray (the set of items being permanently removed).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { permanentlyDeletedItemIds: idsArray, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } serialized via JSON.
required_variables.reason: Provides a persistent record of which item IDs were permanently deleted. The evaluator can confirm that the third ID from task3_videoFilterParams.topThreeIds is included here, proving that the original third-largest qualifying video was the one permanently deleted.

requirements.task_name: Create a restricted public link for 'Team Handbook.pdf' that is view-only, no download, expiring June 30, 2025
requirements.task_description: Find 'Team Handbook.pdf' in the root files, generate a public link that allows anyone with the link to view but not download the file, set the link to expire on June 30, 2025, and copy the link.

requirements.task_name: Gather the 3 most recently modified 'Q3' spreadsheets (last 60 days) into 'Reports/Q3 Reports'
requirements.task_description: Create a 'Q3 Reports' folder under Reports, search for .xlsx files with 'Q3' in the name that were modified in the last 60 days, sort them by most recently modified, and move the first 3 into the 'Q3 Reports' folder.

requirements.task_name: Restore 'Roadmap.docx' to its version from January 15, 2024 at 10:00 AM
requirements.task_description: Open the 'Roadmap.docx' document, view its version history, locate the version saved at 'January 15, 2024, 10:00 AM', restore that version, and exit back to the file list.

requirements.task_name: Make the 2 most recently opened PDFs and the 'Client Pitch' project folder available offline
requirements.task_description: From the Recent view, filter to PDFs, sort by last opened, mark the top 2 PDFs as available offline, then navigate to Projects and make the 'Client Pitch' folder available offline as well.

requirements.task_name: Update download permissions for the newest shared file and label it 'Confidential'
requirements.task_description: In the 'Shared with me' section, identify the most recently shared single file (not a folder), open its share settings, disable downloading for its viewer collaborator, and add a 'Confidential' label to the file.
